title: leontodon leiospermus
intro: Leontodon leiospermus, also known as smooth hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Leontodon leiospermus include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce bloating, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
